title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・情けねえあたし

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One loses the autumn Tenno Sho. Her dream
of becoming Umamusume of the Year is so far
away now that she's losing hope.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Super Creek on the other hand are
as composed as ever. It's clear their strength is on
another level compared to Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Arima Kinen. Determined to
crush Oguri Cap and Super Creek in an
overwhelming victory, Inari One throws herself
into training until she winds up collapsing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intense pressure to win for the sake of the
people of Oi has placed such a huge mental
burden on her that she's reached her limit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, she's so ashamed that she can't even bring
herself to face the people of her hometown. I've
never seen her so downtrodden...
